summary: Tested THE LIONEYO premium clothing brand website - all 13 features tested. Backend API and frontend UI both working well. Minor design issue with hero heading cut off in viewport.

ui_bugs.issue: Hero heading 'IGNITE YOUR STYLE' - 'STYLE' word not visible in standard viewport (1920x1080), text is too large and overflows below fold

integration_issues.issue: Error message on wrong credentials not detectable via standard .error CSS class selectors (may be shown via different UI pattern - toast/alert)

issues: Supabase config warning banner at top is prominent but expected behavior

action_items: Consider adjusting hero heading font size so full 'IGNITE YOUR STYLE' text is visible without scrolling on standard 1080p viewport
Verify error message is visually shown to user when wrong admin credentials are entered (backend returns 401 correctly)
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: ADMIN_PASSWORD hardcoded as env var default 'Lioneyo@123' - acceptable for demo but should use hashed password in production
server.py: JWT_SECRET has fallback default value - in production must be mandatory env var
server.py only has 2 API endpoints (login + verify) - admin product CRUD appears to be Supabase-only (no backend routes for products/settings)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Supabase is not configured. Admin auth via FastAPI JWT works. All 13 test scenarios passed. Hero section shows fallback image. Products show empty state 'NO PRODUCTS YET'. Admin dashboard has Products/Site Settings/View Storefront sidebar tabs. Logout button works. Backend has only /api/ and /api/admin/login and /api/admin/verify endpoints.
